mentions.surface: Cephalio mihi a te litteras reddidit
quamnam rationem sim Caesari adlaturus
cum ex Italia discesserim
a Balbo Cornelio minore
illum existimare Quintum fratrem lituum meae profectionis fuisse
quae de me Quintus scripsisset ad multos
his verbis ad Caesarem scripsi
Cephalio delivered a letter from you to me
what reason for my setting out I am going to put before Caesar
at the moment of my departure from Italy
a letter reached me from the younger Balbus Cornelius
Caesar took my brother Quintus to have been the trumpet of my departure
what Quintus had been writing about me to many people
none the less wrote to Caesar in these words
de Quinto fratre meo non minus laboro quam de me ipso
About my brother Quintus I am no less concerned than about myself
si quis congressus fuerit mihi cum Caesare
quin is lenis in illum futurus sit
magis est nobis laborandum de Africa
cum adiungatur ad Africam etiam Hispania
etiam Hispania
if any meeting takes place between me and Caesar
he will be lenient toward Quintus
we have far more to worry about over Africa
since to Africa Spain too is now being added
Spain too is now being added
ut scribam ad Antonium et ad ceteros
praeclaras generi actiones
Galeonis hereditatem crevi
your advising me to write to Antony and the others
the splendid performances of my son-in-law
I have entered upon Galeo's inheritance
